mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.user_id AS userId, o.tier_name AS tierName, o.id_card AS idCard, o.phone, o.price, o.pay_status AS payStatus, o.verify_status AS verifyStatus, o.create_time AS createTime, c.username FROM ticket_order o LEFT JOIN consumer c ON o.user_id = c.id WHERE o.concert_id = #{concertId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket_order WHERE concert_id = #{concertId}

SELECT o.id, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.concert_id AS concertId, o.tier_name AS tierName, o.price, o.pay_status AS payStatus, o.verify_status AS verifyStatus, o.qr_code_token AS qrCodeToken, o.create_time AS createTime, ct.title AS concertTitle, ct.show_time AS showTime, ct.venue FROM ticket_order o LEFT JOIN concert ct ON o.concert_id = ct.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
